description: Build and deploy site to Cloudflare Pages after fixing retellCallId binding
Disable Vite sourcemap generation (build.sourcemap: false) to reduce build time

asi.hypothesis: Sourcemap generation adds non-trivial overhead to Vite production builds; disabling should reduce total build+deploy time
asi.next_action_hint: Separate build-only timing from deploy variance; next try should either (a) use direct ./node_modules/.bin/wrangler path to avoid npx startup overhead, or (b) optimize actual build time by reducing server-bundle size (heavy deps like three.js, reveal.js bloat worker bundle)
asi.rollback_reason: Total time increased to 21.7s vs baseline 13.9s. Deploy overhead dominated due to npx wrangler resolution and network variance. Build itself was similar speed (~6.3s server build). Sourcemap change did not meaningfully improve build time because Vite already defaults sourcemaps to false in production for client builds.

description: Disable Vite gzip size reporting (build.reportCompressedSize: false) and use local wrangler path to avoid npx overhead

asi.hypothesis: Gzip size computation and npx overhead add visible time to the build+deploy cycle
asi.next_action_hint: Need current baseline at HEAD because prior best (13.9s) was at older commit; try a new untouched baseline run. After establishing current best, try build optimizations like rollupOptions.manualChunks, lighter dependencies, or reducing server bundle size
asi.rollback_reason: Total time 19.6s still higher than historical best 13.9s; gzip reporting/npx were not the bottleneck. Build time is stable around 8.5s; deploy variance dominates
